title: Pura Flushable Moist Toilet Tissue Wipes, 14 x 40 wipes per pack (560 Wipes) 100% Plastic Free, 99% Water Washlets, Certified Fine to Flush Biodegradable, Compostable, Vegan, Gentle, Clean, Wet Wipes

features: SAFE TO FLUSH DOWN THE TOILET*: Pura's flushable wipes are officially accredited by Water UK as "Fine to Flush". It’s the only standard you can trust. They disintegrate with moving water just like toilet paper, so they don’t cause blockages or fatbergs.

KEEPS BOTTOMS HEALTHY: Freshen up and feel cleaner with our soft, gentle wipes. Suitable for sensitive and eczema-prone skin, they are paediatrician and dermatologically approved. They contain mild cleansers, soothing, pure organic aloe vera, 99 percent natural water and no perfume, alcohol or chlorine.
GOOD FOR THE PLANET: Our wipes are 100 percent plastic-free, biodegradable and compostable. UK made from sustainably-sourced plant fibres and supplied in recyclable packaging.
MULTI-ACCREDITED: Pura wipes are certified by British Skin Foundation, Allergy UK, Vegan, Cruelty-Free, Not Tested On Animals and the Soil Association. MADE IN UK
GREAT FOR THE WHOLE FAMILY: From potty training toddlers right through to adult bottoms. Keep in your bathroom or use for cleanliness when camping or visiting festivals.
description: Product Description 14 packs of 40 flushable moist toilet tissue wipes (560 total). At last, super soft toilet tissue wipes that'll keep you clean but don't make a mess for the planet. Toilet wipes can be more effective than dry toilet tissue alone. They have gentle cleansers, skin softening ingredients and are easy to use for kids and adults alike. But most wipes contain plastic and can take up to 100 years to biodegrade. In fact, plastic wipes make up 93 percent of the material causing sewer-clogging fatbergs in sewers. Pura toilet tissue wipes are different! They're dermatologically-tested, and 100 percent plastic-free. ideal of all, they're officially accredited as Fine To Flush by Water UK. So whether they're used for potty training, or on grown-up bottoms, you can be sure they're safe on skin, sewers and the planet. Ingredients No Chlorine, No Perfume, No Alcohol, 99% Water, Aqua, Aloe barbadensis (Aloe vera) leaf juice, Glycerin, Levulinic acid, Sodium levulinate, Sodium benzoate, Disodium cocoamphodiacetate, Potassium sorbate, Sodium chloride Directions Use 1 wipe per flush. Ensure the pack is resealed after use to stop your wet wipes becoming dry wipes. Safety Warning Keep out of reach children. Avoid contact with eyes. If ingested, seek medical help immediately. Not suitable for use in macerator toilets or septic tanks. Manufacturer Contact Information Manufactured for: Mypura.com Limited, 3 Worley Court, Bolesworth Road, Tattenhall, Cheshire, UK, CH3 9HW. EU: CE way Regulatory Consultants Ltd., 13 Upper Baggot Street, Dublin 4, Ireland. See more
